settings.title:

settings.lead: Global Hair Direct supplies braiding hair, bulk hair, and premium hair extensions directly to salon owners, distributors, and individual buyers across all 36 Nigerian states — with consistent quality, transparent pricing, and accountable delivery every order.
settings.tagline: From supplier to your door. No complications.
settings.notice_text: Bone Straight, French Curl & Deep Wave — order now and receive 5% discount on your total. Wholesale pricing available for salon and distributor accounts.

settings.title: All Hair Types
settings.desc: Braiding hair, bulk hair, bone straight, french curl, deep wave — individual and wholesale quantities.

settings.title: Multiple Colours
settings.desc: 1B, 27#, BUG, 613# and more — stocked across all product lines for salon and retail buyers.

settings.title: Pre-Order Pricing
settings.desc: Reserve stock before it arrives. Fixed price at time of order. 5% discount on pre-order quantities.

settings.title: 36-State Delivery
settings.desc: Same-day Lagos dispatch. GIG Logistics and DHL nationwide. WhatsApp tracking at every milestone.

settings.title: Every Hair Type.
settings.lead: Global Hair Direct supplies a full range of hair products to salon owners, beauty distributors, and individual buyers across Nigeria. We stock what sells, price it fairly, and deliver it on time — every order.

settings.title: Bone Straight Braiding Hair — 30inch 150g
settings.text: Available in colours 1B, 27#, BUG, and 613#. Suitable for knotless braids, box braids, and straight styles. Stocked in bulk quantities for salon and wholesale orders. Pre-order pricing available with 5% discount on confirmed orders.

settings.title: French Curl Hair — 22inch 150g
settings.text: Available in colours 1B, 27#, BUG, and 613#. Lightweight and manageable for crochet and freeform curl styles. Consistent curl pattern across all colour options. Individual and wholesale quantities available.

settings.title: Deep Wave Bulk Hair — 22inch 100g
settings.text: Available in colours 1B, 27#, BUG, and 613#. Ideal for deep wave installs, crochet, and bulk styling. 100g per unit — competitively priced for volume buyers. Salon and distributor discounts available.

settings.title: Coming Soon — Premium Human Hair Extensions
settings.text: Global Hair Direct is expanding into premium human hair bundles, HD lace frontals, and closures. Pre-registration for wholesale accounts is open now. Existing customers receive first-access allocation when stock launches.

settings.title: One Standard.
settings.lead: Global Hair Direct supplies quality hair products directly to Nigerian buyers — salon owners, beauty distributors, and individuals — with fair wholesale pricing, multiple colour options, and reliable nationwide delivery on every order.

settings.label: What we are:
settings.text: A direct hair supplier servicing salon owners, distributors, and individual buyers across all 36 Nigerian states.

settings.label: What we supply:
settings.text: Braiding hair, bulk hair, and curl hair — with premium human hair extensions launching soon.

settings.label: What we offer:
settings.text: Wholesale pricing tiers, pre-order discounts, and dedicated support for salon and distributor accounts.

settings.label: What we do not do:
settings.text: Process unconfirmed orders, substitute colours without approval, or ship outside Nigeria.

settings.title: Structured Pricing.
settings.lead: Pricing reflects order volume and account type. All pricing confirmed in writing before any order is processed. No hidden charges.

settings.name: Individual Buyer
settings.perks:
Order any colour combination per product
Free delivery on orders above ₦50,000
30-day satisfaction guarantee
WhatsApp tracking from dispatch to door

settings.name: Salon Owner
settings.perks:
Salon-tier pricing across all hair types
Mixed colour orders accepted per product
Monthly standing order option available
Priority dispatch and dedicated support
First access to new product launches

settings.name: Wholesale Distributor
settings.perks:
Lowest per-unit pricing available
Full colour and product mix per order
Custom packaging options available
Dedicated account manager assigned
Net-30 payment terms for verified accounts
Multi-state distribution support

settings.title: Simple Process.
settings.lead: Every order — standard or pre-order — follows a documented process with confirmed pricing, clear timelines, and WhatsApp tracking from dispatch to delivery.

settings.title: Select Your Products
settings.text: Choose your hair type, colour, and quantity from our catalogue. Mix colours within the same product line — 1B, 27#, BUG, and 613# all available. Confirm availability before proceeding.

settings.title: Confirm Pricing & Pay
settings.text: Receive a confirmed price list based on your order and account tier. Pay via Paystack, Flutterwave, or direct bank transfer. Order is confirmed in writing upon cleared payment — no informal commitments.

settings.title: Track Your Order
settings.text: Receive WhatsApp updates at defined milestones — order confirmed, dispatched, and in transit. One communication channel per order. Same-day Lagos dispatch for orders confirmed before 12pm.

settings.title: Receive Your Delivery
settings.text: Delivered to all 36 states via GIG Logistics and DHL Nigeria. Lagos 24–48 hours. Abuja and Port Harcourt 1–2 days. Remote states 2–4 days. Delivery confirmation issued on completion.

settings.question: What hair types do you currently stock?
settings.answer: We currently stock three lines — 30inch 150g Bone Straight Braiding Hair, 22inch 150g French Curl Hair, and 22inch 100g Deep Wave Bulk. All three are available in colours 1B, 27#, BUG, and 613#. Premium human hair bundles and frontals are launching soon.

settings.question: Can I mix colours in one order?
settings.answer: Yes. You can mix colours within the same product line in a single order. Just specify the quantity per colour when placing your order. Minimum quantities apply per colour depending on the product — confirm with our team before ordering.

settings.question: What is the pre-order discount?
settings.answer: Pre-orders placed before stock arrives receive a 5% discount off the standard unit price. The discounted price is confirmed in writing at the time of order. Additional wholesale discounts apply for salon and distributor accounts on top of the pre-order rate.

settings.question: Do you deliver outside Lagos?
settings.answer: Yes — all 36 states and the FCT via GIG Logistics and DHL Nigeria. Lagos orders receive same-day dispatch for payments confirmed before 12pm. Abuja and Port Harcourt typically 1–2 days. Remote states 2–4 days.

settings.question: When are premium human hair bundles launching?
settings.answer: Premium human hair bundles, HD lace frontals, and closures are in our product pipeline. Pre-registration for wholesale accounts is open now — registered accounts will receive first-access allocation and launch pricing before general availability.

settings.title: Order Today.
settings.text: Bone Straight Braiding Hair, French Curl, and Deep Wave Bulk — all in stock and available for immediate pre-order at 5% below standard pricing. Wholesale accounts receive additional discounts. No commitment required to enquire.
